title: 267 Mathematics 2.   Length of the rectangular paper =   l   = circumference of the base of the
subject: Mathematics
activityTitle: 267 Mathematics 2.   Length of the rectangular paper =   l   = circumference of the base of the
objective: To verify that the opposite sides of a parallelogram are equal
materials:
Cardboard, white sheet of paper, adhesive, scissors,
red sketch pen.
procedure:
1.   Take a cardboard of convenient size and
paste a white paper on it.
2.   Draw two identical parallelograms on a
white sheet of paper. Name them as ABCD.
Join AC in both the parallelograms. Cut
out both the parallelograms.
3.   Paste one of the parallelograms on the cardboard (Fig. 1).
4.   Cut the other parallelogram ABCD along the diagonal AC as shown in
Fig. 2 to get two triangles ABC and ACD.
5.   Superpose and paste the triangle CDA on the triangle ABC as shown
in Fig. 3.
Fig. 2   Fig. 3

So,   2 π r   =   l   =   ,   h   =   b   =   ,
Area of the rectangular paper =   l   ×   b   =   .
Therefore, the curved surface area of the cylinder = 2 π rh.
discussion:
This result can be used in finding the material used in making cylindrical
containers, i.e., powder tins, drums, oil tanks used in industrial units,
overhead water tanks etc.
